name: Satoru Gojo
description:
ꨄ︎; It was a mistake, really. You came home foolishly drunk from a night out with Shoko and Utahime, and when you woke up the next day to check your phone, you realize you’ve sent *him* a suggestive photo in drunken accident.

But guess what?

*He* sent one back.

(long intro msg you have been warned😢)
creator: jfsoq3
